case_title: EDDY STREET APARTMENTS, INC. VS. JENNIFER SY et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-18-2003 - NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN PURSUANT TO REQUEST BY COUNCIL FOR PLAINTIFF. TO COURT TRIAL ON 9/22/03.
MINUTES FOR SEP-18-2003 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 206

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-22-2003 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON SEP-22-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206, JURY DEMAND STRICKEN AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF 9/18/03, PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL BECAUSE DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. D. CARTER, CLERK.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDDY STREET APARTMENTS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SY, JENNIFER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1096 EDDY STREET APT. # 205, SEE SCANNED DOC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDDY STREET APARTMENTS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SY, JENNIFER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
